Battery charge and discharge management, state transitions, and voltage-to-percentage conversion functions.


## Files
- **[battery_curve.c](battery_curve.c.md)**: Defines battery charge and discharge voltage curves for different platforms and provides functions to calculate battery percentage and voltage.
- **[battery_curve.h](battery_curve.h.md)**: Functions for battery voltage to percentage conversion and compensation in Pebble firmware.
- **[battery_monitor.c](battery_monitor.c.md)**: Manages battery state transitions and logging for different power levels in a Pebble device.
- **[battery_monitor.h](battery_monitor.h.md)**: Manages power state and service control in response to battery state changes, including low power modes.
- **[battery_state.c](battery_state.c.md)**: Manages battery state, including monitoring charge status, voltage, and connection events, with analytics integration.
- **[battery_state.h](battery_state.h.md)**: Functions and structures for managing and retrieving battery charge state and status.
